embeds.title: Bishop's Ideas
embeds.description:
** Looks like swing season is somewhat confirmed

I will be looking at swings later today to see if there is anything good. Just a few rules I follow by when swinging:

- My SL is around 35% or invalidation on the chart
- My swings are supposed to be held for 1-3 weeks BUT I prefer to have a move overnigh across the first or at least the second day
- I like taking my first trim around 30%
- My cons that I pick are usually monthly cons
- I put out what I am looking at within the last 30 minutes of the market day
- I personally enter swings around the last 5 minutes of the day 
- I do not size heavy in swings since I have less control over how the overnight moves go

Remember, oversizing OR sizing up on swings does not typically increase success, it usually hinders it **

[How I Trade](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1RiY1KRn3427q8e568_SvYbUpf0UC7z6tSbmG_cLrgt4/edit?usp=sharing)

[The Market Bishop Trade Idea's Disclaimer](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1VDNTRLwhmCxYiHRLW32WS-SqgDd2vP_wefcdcsd_KEw/edit?usp=sharing)

embeds.title: Bishop's Ideas
embeds.description:
** Reason I expect you guys to catch this is because of all our previous TSLA trades

You had a gap up, initial leg down, small bounce then a flush. The first flush is not something I would expect most to catch as it is the riskiest. But I do like the second small bounce we had to the 10 sma which is where it rejected and gave at a second entry for puts, this was easiest and most lucrative position out of the two

This setup is very similar to almost all of our TSLA Friday put setups we have been taking for the past few months. No need to worry about catching the move first, just waiting for confirmation than acting on that

Cons are over 400% now **

[How I Trade](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1RiY1KRn3427q8e568_SvYbUpf0UC7z6tSbmG_cLrgt4/edit?usp=sharing)

[The Market Bishop Trade Idea's Disclaimer](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1VDNTRLwhmCxYiHRLW32WS-SqgDd2vP_wefcdcsd_KEw/edit?usp=sharing)

Please remember the following:

embeds.title: Bishop's Ideas
embeds.description:
** This scanner is on Thinkorswim, but you can possibly replicate it on other platforms if you would like

No matter what scanner you have, you should always check each setup and never blindly take anything that pops up

Since this scanner is not fully done, there will be some not so great stocks you have to sort through but that should be easy. Its not special just yet, BUT it does give a nice list of stocks to look throughout the day

This is for bullish setups only, it does not populate bearish setups (You can inverse it if you wanted it to). There is a lot more I plan to add to this to get a lot more fine tuned results

I also would say its important to adjust the volume filter from lower numbers at open (probably around 250 or 500) to higher numbers as the day goes by (1000 to 3000)

This is all free and the better version of this scanner will be free for you when its done as well, enjoy **

[How I Trade](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1RiY1KRn3427q8e568_SvYbUpf0UC7z6tSbmG_cLrgt4/edit?usp=sharing)
